sourceMovie.title: Seoul Vibe
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Seoul Vibe works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Knockin' on Heaven's Door
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Seoul Vibe clicked for you, Knockin' on Heaven's Door (1997) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Seoul Vibe?
faq.answer: Try Knockin' on Heaven's Door, Debt Collectors, Furious 7—each shares DNA with Seoul Vibe while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Seoul Vibe?
faq.answer: Seoul Vibe (2022) is best described as Action, Crime, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Seoul Vibe worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
